messages.content: Generate web-search queries to verify or refute market-risk hypotheses. Queries must contain concrete entities (directive names, vendor names, country + year), never topic words. Each risk gets one CONFIRMING query, one FALSIFYING query (search for what would disconfirm — derived from the falsifier field), and one BASE-RATE/analog query where useful.

content: {"items":[{"riskId":"risk.ledger-self-audit.framework-agreements-hollow-large-operator-cell","queries":[{"query":"Digital Realty Schneider Electric global framework agreement power distribution units","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"colocation operator PDU competitive multi-vendor bid 2024 2025 new supplier won","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"data center PDU procurement framework agreement vs discrete bid market share hyperscale","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.ledger-self-audit.europe-thirty-percent-arithmetic-ghost","queries":[{"query":"Grand View Research rack PDU market report North America 38% share Europe","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"IndexBox European Union rack PDU market report country data","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"QY Research global PDU market size 2023 Strategic Market Research PDU market size comparison","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.ledger-self-audit.oem-cell-double-squeeze-foreclosure","queries":[{"query":"Digipower ODM PDU manufacturer white label data center","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"rack integrator master distributor open white-label PDU sourcing new manufacturer qualification","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"data center integrator PDU vendor selection criteria certification DCIM compatibility case study","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.ledger-self-audit.nl-frozen-colo-stock-share-decay","queries":[{"query":"Amsterdam data center grid connection moratorium 2030 350 MVA capacity","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Dutch Data Center Association 2026 colocation capacity growth report Netherlands","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"Netherlands hyperscale self-build data center CAGR versus colocation CAGR forecast","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.execution-window.som-window-semantics-year1-zero","queries":[{"query":"Prospeo IdeaPlan serviceable obtainable market SOM definition 1-3 years capture","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"intelligent PDU startup captured 1% serviceable market first 12 months launch","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"early-stage hardware startup SOM market share capture rate year one benchmark data center","kind":"base-rate"}]}]}
